inputs.label: Age (months)
inputs.businessContext: Baby's age in months, used for length estimation based on standard growth curves.

businessContext_i18n.en: Baby's age in months, used for length estimation based on standard growth curves.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bebeğin ay cinsinden yaşı, standart büyüme eğrilerine dayalı boy tahmini için kullanılır.

inputs.label: Weight (kg)
inputs.businessContext: Baby's weight in kilograms, a supplementary predictor for length.

businessContext_i18n.en: Baby's weight in kilograms, a supplementary predictor for length.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bebeğin kilogram cinsinden ağırlığı, boy için tamamlayıcı bir tahmin edici.

inputs.label: Gender (0=girl, 1=boy)
inputs.businessContext: Gender code (0 for female, 1 for male) to apply length offset.

businessContext_i18n.en: Gender code (0 for female, 1 for male) to apply length offset.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Cinsiyet kodu (0 kadın, 1 erkek) boy ofsetini uygulamak için.

inputs.label: Premature (weeks)
inputs.businessContext: Number of weeks born early; used to correct age for prematurity adjustment.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of weeks born early; used to correct age for prematurity adjustment.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Erken doğan hafta sayısı; prematüre ayarlaması için yaşı düzeltmek amacıyla kullanılır.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
